name: ak-baseball
description: Personal MLB stats viewer on Databricks Apps

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=client
